surface: api (session tools) + web (humanized engine input path)

adversarialCases.scenario: compare cloak_click (engine path) vs a synthetic DOM-dispatched click
adversarialCases.expected: cloak_click emits multi-step trusted pointer motion; synthetic click emits 0 moves (proves the humanized assertion has teeth)

adversarialCases.scenario: cloak_navigate to file:// and to http:// (approvalRequired)
interleave two session-touching calls; overflow the depth bound
adversarialCases.expected: calls serialized in arrival order; overflow returns structured busy, never a raced page

adversarialCases.scenario: teardown + idle expiry while a guarded claim is pending
adversarialCases.expected: needs-confirmation / session left alive unless force:true

notes: cloak_click/cloak_type/cloak_scroll route writes through the engine humanClick/humanType/humanScroll functions whose behavioral humanization (multi-step trusted pointer, paced keystrokes) is captured in artifacts/humanize-spike-transcript.json + humanize-spike-screenshot.png; humanize-contract.test.mjs proves the tools invoke that path.
regressions: none — full mcp suite (24 tests) green; engine untouched; validate unaffected (mcp/ is not mirrored).
